title: Multi-Model Agent Benchmark
description: Build a POC comparing agentic task completion rates across Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-4, and open-source models. Test coding, tool use, and multi-step reasoning tasks.

title: Self-Funded Health Plan Cost Simulator
description: Interactive calculator comparing fully-insured vs self-funded + stop loss costs for employers with 100-5000 employees. Factor in specific and aggregate deductibles, expected claims, and carrier pricing.

title: Automated SRE Dashboard
description: Consolidate Scout's daily system health checks into a live dashboard. Track disk, memory, load, port exposure, and agent health over time with trend lines.

title: AI-Powered Security Audit Reporter
description: Combine Sentinel's security scans with Scout's system checks into a unified security posture report. Flag regressions automatically.

title: Stop Loss Claims Severity Tracker
description: Track and visualize large claim trends (gene therapy, GLP-1, transplants) that drive stop loss pricing. Use public data sources to model impact on attachment points.

title: React Component Library for Agent UIs
description: Build a shared React component library for all agent-facing dashboards. Cards, tables, status badges, and charts — minimal and consistent design system.

title: Real-Time Agent Monitoring Dashboard
description: Evolve the Command Center view into a real-time agent monitoring system. Show live status (idle/working/error), current task, token usage, and cost per agent. WebSocket-powered updates.

title: Digital Wellness Tracker for Teams
description: Inspired by Digital Exhaustion — build a tool that helps teams track communication channel usage, response time patterns, and after-hours work. Identify burnout risk signals.

title: Interactive Learning Paths Engine
description: Convert the Learning Hub into a proper React+Vite app with functional learning paths — sequential module unlocking, real lesson content, quiz engine, progress persistence, and completion certificates.

title: Mission Control Command Center (NASA Theme)
description: NASA-style dark ops theme for the boardroom view — radar sweep animation, orbital rings for Opus vs Llama agents, network connection lines, glowing pulse indicators for active agents, and a live status bar.

title: Agent-to-Agent Communication Graph
description: Visualize inter-agent message flows in real time. Show which agents delegate to which, message volume, and bottlenecks. Could extend the Command Center with a network topology layer.

title: Intelligent Attention Management System
description: Apply Digital Exhaustion principles to agent notifications — smart batching, urgency scoring, quiet hours enforcement. Reduce notification fatigue for Bel while ensuring nothing critical is missed.

title: Agent Performance Retro Generator
description: Auto-generate weekly retrospectives per agent — tasks completed, response quality, cost efficiency, and improvement suggestions. Feed into Mission Control as a reports section.

title: Portal Registration Flow Simulator
description: Build an interactive simulator for enterprise portal registration/login flows (SAML, OIDC, MFA). Useful for Bel's enterprise portal work — test edge cases, visualize token flows, and debug auth issues.
